reasoning: Malta is a significant underdog to win Eurovision 2025. According to the latest available betting odds (May 10), Malta's representative, Miriana Conte, has an implied probability of about 1.7% of winning the competition. This figure doesn't account for the bookmaker's overround, meaning the true probability is likely closer to 1.2-1.4%. Sweden is currently the overwhelming favorite, commanding an implied win probability of around 40%. Additionally, the Polymarket estimate was at 1% on May 1st. Given these factors, while Malta has a solid chance of qualifying for the Grand Final, their chance of securing an outright win is negligible. I am forecasting the probability at 0.02 (the lower bound for predictions in the schema).
